root_cause.text: The inclusion of an "alias" property in the servlet registration allowed the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard to expose the Gogo shell and other plugins on unauthenticated, top-level URLs (such as /gogo) instead of restricting them to the authenticated webconsole paths.
root_cause.evidence: The patch removes the `props.put("alias", "/gogo");` and similar alias properties for features and instances in the respective `Activator.java` files, which corresponds to the CVE description of the Gogo console becoming available at an unsecured URL when the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard is installed.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The inclusion of an "alias" property in the servlet registration allowed the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard to expose the Gogo shell and other plugins on unauthenticated, top-level URLs (such as /gogo) instead of restricting them to the authenticated webconsole paths.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch removes the `props.put("alias", "/gogo");` and similar alias properties for features and instances in the respective `Activator.java` files, which corresponds to the CVE description of the Gogo console becoming available at an unsecured URL when the Pax Web Extender Whiteboard is installed.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove the explicit alias property from the Servlet registration to correct path routing.
intent_record.what: Removed the line that sets the 'alias' property in the properties dictionary.
intent_record.how: Stops the featuresPlugin Servlet from being registered with the explicit '/features' alias, likely deferring to the 'felix.webconsole.label' property for path resolution.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove alias property from servlet registration to fix routing conflicts.
intent_record.what: Removed the line adding the 'alias' property.
intent_record.how: Stops the servlet from being explicitly registered with the '/gogo' alias.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove explicit alias property to fix servlet registration configuration.
intent_record.what: The 'alias' property is removed from the properties dictionary used for servlet registration.
intent_record.how: This prevents the servlet from being explicitly bound to the '/instance' alias via this property, likely relying on the web console label instead.

grouping_result.intent: Remove explicit alias property to fix servlet registration configuration.

consistency_review.core_intent: Remove explicit alias property from servlet registration to fix routing conflicts.

relevance_review.reason: The group removes the explicit 'alias' property from the servlet registration, which directly addresses the root cause of exposing unauthenticated top-level URLs.

candidates.rationale: This statement registers the 'alias' property, which exposes the features plugin on an unauthenticated top-level URL.
This statement registers the 'alias' property, which exposes the Gogo shell on an unauthenticated top-level URL.
This statement registers the 'alias' property, which exposes the instance plugin on an unauthenticated top-level URL.

vuln_statements.explanation: This statement registers the 'alias' property, which exposes the Gogo shell on an unauthenticated top-level URL as described in the root cause.
This statement registers the 'alias' property for the features plugin, similarly exposing it on an unauthenticated top-level URL.
This statement registers the 'alias' property for the instance plugin, similarly exposing it on an unauthenticated top-level URL.

bic_trace_step.commit_msg: [KARAF-3843] Get rid of blueprint dependency in the web console
bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit f032ce95d41c50e01eb785ecd921eedef9b40d9e
Author: Guillaume Nodet <gnodet@apache.org>
Date:   Thu Jul 9 11:21:04 2015 +0200

    [KARAF-3843] Get rid of blueprint dependency in the web console

diff --git a/webconsole/gogo/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/gogo/Activator.java b/webconsole/gogo/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/gogo/Activator.java
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..4825600410
--- /dev/null
+++ b/webconsole/gogo/src/main/java/org/apache/karaf/webconsole/g
bic_trace_step.reason: The function doStart() explicitly adds the 'alias' property (props.put("alias", "/gogo");) to the servlet registration, which is the exact root cause of the vulnerability as it exposes the Gogo shell on an unauthenticated top-level URL.

new file mode 100644

--- /dev/null
+++ b/webconsole/features/src/main/java/org/apach
bic_trace_step.reason: The function `doStart` explicitly adds the 'alias' property (`props.put("alias", "/features");`) before registering the Servlet, which is the root cause of the vulnerability allowing unauthenticated access.
